name: RPB2_Sordariomycetes
description: Fungal RNA polymerase II second-largest subunit (RPB2) — nuclear protein-coding marker, ~700 bp barcode window — in Sordariomycetes. Ascomycete class with many plant pathogens (Fusarium, Trichoderma). Among the best phylogenetic markers across the fungal tree (Liu 1999). Allow high mismatch.
